name: The Ultimate Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together all ingredients except oil.
2. Whisk the mixture while slowly drizzling in the oil.
3. Let the dressing stand for 30 minutes to allow flavors to blend.
4. Whisk again before using.
5. Alternatively, you can make the dressing in a food processor by pulsing all ingredients together.
